The agent's RevocationRegistry entry is NOT changed \u2014 use emergencyRevoke for that."},"validateUserOp((address,uint256,bytes,bytes,bytes32,uint256,bytes32,bytes,bytes),bytes32)":{"notice":"ERC-7579 / ERC-4337 validation. Called by the entrypoint on every UserOp.         Returns VALIDATION_SUCCESS (0) or VALIDATION_FAILED (1).         MUST NOT revert \u2014 violations emit an event and return VALIDATION_FAILED."}},"notice":"The core enforcement contract. Implements ERC-7579 IValidator.         Every AI agent UserOp passes through `validateUserOp` before execution.         Validation order (15 steps):          1. Decode callData \u2192 (target, selector, tokenAddress, amount)          2. Resolve agentId from sender address          3. Check agent is registered and active in AgentRegistry          4. Check agent is not revoked in RevocationRegistry       \u2190 CRITICAL          5. Load active PermissionScope          6. Check scope is not manually revoked          7. Check scope validity window (validFrom / validUntil)          8. Check target is in allowedProtocols (or allowAnyProtocol)          9. Check function selector is in allowedSelectors (or empty = all)         10. Check token is in allowedTokens (or allowAnyToken)         11. Check time-of-day / day-of-week window (if configured)         12. Get USD value via SpendTracker oracle         13. Check per-tx spend cap         14. Check rolling 24h daily cap         15. Record spend + log action \u2192 return VALIDATION_SUCCESS         On any failure (steps 2\u201314): emit PermissionViolation + return eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

DOMAIN_SEPARATOR().notice: Returns the EIP-712 domain separator (ERC-5267 compatible accessor).

emergencyRevoke(bytes32).notice: Hard revoke: marks scope as revoked AND adds to RevocationRegistry.         The agent will be permanently blocked until reinstated.

grantPermission(bytes32,(bytes32,address.notice: Grant a permission scope to an agent.         Requires a valid EIP-712 signature from the agent's owner.

revokePermission(bytes32).notice: Revoke the active permission scope for an agent (soft revoke).         The agent's RevocationRegistry entry is NOT changed — use emergencyRevoke for that.

validateUserOp((address,uint256,bytes,by.notice: ERC-7579 / ERC-4337 validation. Called by the entrypoint on every UserOp.         Returns VALIDATION_SUCCESS (0) or VALIDATION_FAILED (1).         MUST NOT revert — violations emit an event and return VALIDATION_FAILED.
